turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello? Yes, I want to make an appointment. For... uh, neurology. I've been getting headaches quite often.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Yes, we can certainly schedule a neurology consultation for you. Could I take your name and number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Farhan Qureshi. And my number is... hold on... 9512348760.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Farhan. Dr. Leena Verma is our neurologist, and she has a slot available this Thursday at 4 PM or next Tuesday at 11 AM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: This Thursday is too soon, I think. Let's go with Tuesday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tuesday, 11 AM with Dr. Leena Verma — all set for Farhan Qureshi. You'll receive an SMS with the appointment details.
